plan.reasoning: Sovereign Blade deals 42 damage to the Rock Bowlbug, which has 22 HP, killing it instantly. This eliminates all incoming damage since the Silk Bowlbug is only using a Debuff intent. With the remaining 1 energy, playing Venerate+ generates 3 stars, enabling Cloak of Stars to be played for free block and keeping 2 stars for the next turn.
